commands.review_summary:
The PR tracks assistant-content state for Telegram answer previews, deletes archived tool-only previews at assistant boundaries, adds regression coverage, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can archive a tool-progress-only answer preview with deleteIfUnused:false and then skip deletion during cleanup. I did not execute the regression test in this read-only sweep.
